hint.en: Enable periodical fetch of Tibber consumption data to Homey Insights. Periodical fetch produces a lot of traffic towards Tibber API so enable only if needed.

Set a limit to how often the values should update.
Range: 5 - 3600 seconds, 
Default: 30

Currency when using Nord Pool prices
Default: NOK

Only applicable if you don't have a valid Tibber subscription

Price area when using Nord Pool prices
Default: Oslo
